g.title: cluster_host
g.text: instapphost.eecs.berkeley.edu — rootless Docker, provenance service account

g.title: cluster_nfs
g.text: /home/submit/provenance — NFS, 1 TB HARD QUOTA, no headroom

g.title: cluster_cron
g.text: SCHEDULED JOBS — every one has an explicit shutdown path

g.title: sock
g.text: unix socket — no port is ever exposed

g.title: j1
g.text: deletes BLOBS only — rows persist forever

g.title: hchk
g.text: dead-man's switch — catches a SILENT failure,

g.title: dumpc
g.text: scheduled pg_dump into the backup directory

g.title: j5
g.text: alerts before the 1 TB wall is hit

g.title: deploy
g.text: deploy is manual, by hand, over SSH
GitHub's hosted runners cannot reach instapphost,
so there is no CI/CD for this environment
